full_text:
Zhou Bin
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Bin. Placed in charge of investigating who had been aiding the Turbans in the capital and outside, leading to the execution over a thousand people. Zhou Bin was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
